PlayerVisibility.Name: Player Shop Visibility
PlayerVisibility.Hint: Controls whether players can browse shop inventory directly, or if the DM relays all information.

BuybackRate.Name: Default Buyback Rate
BuybackRate.Hint: Default percentage of base price offered when players sell items to a shop (0.50 = 50%).

AutoDetectPartyLevel.Name: Auto-Detect Party Level
AutoDetectPartyLevel.Hint: Automatically calculate average party level from active player characters for item tier gating.

ManualPartyLevel.Name: Manual Party Level
ManualPartyLevel.Hint: Set party level manually when auto-detect is disabled. Used for item rarity gating.

EnableBias.Name: Enable Shopkeeper Bias
EnableBias.Hint: Allow shopkeepers to occasionally generate with negative biases against certain races or classes. Purely for RP flavor.

ShopManager.Title: Shop Manager
ShopManager.NoShops: No shops yet. Click "Create New Shop" to get started.
ShopManager.DeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this shop? This cannot be undone.

ShopConfig.Title: Create New Shop
ShopConfig.GenerateFirst: Generate a shop first before saving.
